message.content:
Subject: Formal Complaint: Damaged and Late Delivery – Order #[Insert Order Number]

Dear [Customer Service Name or "Customer Support Team"],

I am writing to formally express my dissatisfaction with the recent delivery of my order, #[Insert Order Number], which was placed on [Insert Date of Purchase].

The package was expected to arrive by [Insert Expected Delivery Date]; however, it did not arrive until [Insert Actual Delivery Date], resulting in a delay of two weeks. Furthermore, upon opening the package, I discovered that the contents were significantly damaged. [Briefly describe the damage, e.g., The box was crushed, and the item inside was cracked/broken].

As a loyal customer, I have always relied on your company for timely and safe deliveries. Unfortunately, this experience has fallen far below the standards I expect from your brand. The combination of the excessive delay and the poor condition of the received items has caused me considerable inconvenience and frustration.

Attached to this email, please find photographic evidence of the damage sustained during transit, as well as a copy of the original order confirmation and the delivery notification.

Given these circumstances, I request a full refund of the purchase price, including any shipping costs incurred. Alternatively, if a replacement is available, I would prefer to receive a new item shipped via expedited delivery at no additional cost, ensuring it arrives within the next [e.g., 3-5] business days.

I trust that you will handle this matter with the urgency it deserves. I look forward to your prompt response and a satisfactory resolution within the next [e.g., 5] business days.

Thank you for your attention to this issue.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Address, if necessary for replacement]
[Order Number]

**Attachments:**
1. Photo of damaged packaging
2.
